title: derris benthamii var. wightii
intro: Derris benthamii var. wightii, also known as the Indian rope plant or wight's derris, is a plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Derris benthamii var. wightii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Derris benthamii var. wightii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, and poultices for treating various health conditions.
